steps.title: Track the outcome shift
steps.content: The passage first says many island regions became independent nations. The next sentence names the Northern Mariana Islands and the Society Islands as still tied to the US or French Polynesia. The transition must signal contrast.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: Choice A would introduce another example of independence, not the opposite. Choice B signals result. Choice C signals emphasis or elaboration, but the sentence gives contrasting cases. The answer is D.
